feed.title: Canva
feed.subtitle: Canva newsroom announcements and Learn design guides, aggregated via Google News

entry.title: Canva launches Global Goals Platform to find where our hopes overlap
entry.content:
The Global Goals Platform is the latest initiative under our Two-Step Plan: our commitment to using our success as a force for good in the world.
News · Step Two

entry.title: Canva launches Global Goals Platform to find where our hopes overlap
entry.content: Canva launches Global Goals Platform to find where our hopes overlap  Canva News
entry.dc:creator: Canva

entry.title: Canva expands design creation inside Google Gemini and AI Search
entry.content: Canva expands design creation inside Google Gemini and AI Search  Canva News
entry.dc:creator: Canva

entry.title: Vibe coding that matches your vision: Canva Code 2.0 is now available to all
entry.content: Vibe coding that matches your vision: Canva Code 2.0 is now available to all  Canva News
entry.dc:creator: Canva

entry.title: Vibe coding that matches your vision: Canva Code 2.0 is now available to all
entry.content:
Canva Code 2.0 is here: vibe code websites, apps and interactive experiences, then edit like a Canva design.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Your Back to School toolkit: Everything teachers need for the year ahead
entry.content: Your Back to School toolkit: Everything teachers need for the year ahead  Canva News
entry.dc:creator: Canva

entry.title: Your Back to School toolkit: Everything teachers need for the year ahead
entry.content:
A practical guide to everything Canva Education offers heading into the new school year, from AI-powered lesson planning and interactive classroom tools to ongoing learning pathways for teachers and students.
News · Education

entry.title: What we learned at ISTE 2026
entry.content: What we learned at ISTE 2026  Canva News
entry.dc:creator: Canva

entry.title: What we learned at ISTE 2026
entry.content:
We spent three days at ISTELive 2026 in Orlando connecting with educators from around the world, and here's what we learned.
News · Education

entry.title: Day 4 at Cannes: The brands people remember
entry.content:
Canva's Executive Creative Director reflects on Day 4 at Cannes Lions, making the case that in a world where the tools keep changing, the brands that endure are the ones with the courage to be distinctive and the consistency to earn genuine trust over time.
News · Perspectives

entry.title: Day 3 at Cannes: Originality, imagination, and the brands built to last
entry.content:
Canva's Chief Customer Officer reflects on Day 3 at Cannes Lions, making the case that in a world where everyone has access to the same powerful tools, originality and imagination have never mattered more.
News · Perspectives

entry.title: Introducing Canva Grow 2.0: Create, launch, and learn from ads, all in one place
entry.content:
Today at Cannes Lions, we unveiled Canva Grow 2.0, and with it, a new way for marketing teams to create, launch, and learn from ads – all without leaving Canva.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Day 2 at Cannes: Who gets to be creative?
entry.content:
Canva's Head of EMEA, Duncan Clark, reflects on Day 2 at Cannes Lions, making the case that the creative industry's most pressing challenge isn't AI, but ensuring the tools, access, and space that skilled designers need to do their best work aren't quietly being taken away.
News · Perspectives

entry.title: Day 1 at Cannes: It’s all about experience
entry.content:
Our Global Head of Experiential reflects on Day 1 at Cannes Lions, making the case that in an increasingly automated world, the moments that make people feel something together have never mattered more.
News · Perspectives

entry.title: Disney Pixar Toy Story template collection is here
entry.content:
Toy Story 5 is officially in theaters, and together with Disney, we’re celebrating with a free collection of templates spanning all five films, made for every kind of fan.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: A classroom to count on: How we helped rebuild two schools after Typhoon Uwan
entry.content:
After Typhoon Uwan devastated nearly 3,000 schools across the Philippines, the Canva Foundation partnered with nonprofit HOPE to build permanent, storm-resistant classrooms for hundreds of students who had lost their place to learn.
News · Step Two

entry.title: How to make a coloring book to entertain your kids
entry.content: Learn

entry.title: Classroom management strategies to try this school year
entry.content: Learn · Education

entry.title: The brand infrastructure question every CMO should be asking
entry.content:
As AI enables every team to create more content faster, the companies that stay on brand won't be the ones policing output – they'll be the ones who built brand governance into the system from the start.
News · Perspectives

entry.title: Make AI images your own: Magic Layers is now inside the world's biggest AI assistants
entry.content:
Magic Layers is now available inside Gemini and ChatGPT, turning AI-generated images into fully editable Canva designs, so the idea you love is also the one you can actually finish.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Bringing on-brand design creation to AI workflows: Create with Canva inside ChatGPT and Codex
entry.content:
Canva now enables full design creation directly in ChatGPT – generate, edit, and preview designs without leaving the conversation. This follows the earlier launch of our deep research connector, which empowers users to search and summarize existing Canva content inside ChatGPT.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: From AI research to ready-to-use creative: Canva comes to Perplexity Computer
entry.content:
Canva is now Perplexity's only design partner in Perplexity Computer, letting growing businesses turn AI-generated research and insights directly into polished, editable designs, without leaving their workflow.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: What’s New: Our latest launches you won’t want to miss
entry.content:
This month's launches are all about closing the gap between creating and sharing, with sharper AI, smoother workflows, and more ways to publish directly from Canva.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Canva expands design creation inside Google Gemini
entry.content:
Our latest integration with Google Gemini builds on recent launches with Claude, ChatGPT, and Microsoft Copilot, bringing design directly into AI workflows.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Inside our second ‘AI Discovery Week’: What it really takes to build an AI-native workforce
entry.content:
This year, we gave all 5,300 of our team a dedicated week to put the day-to-day down, experiment, and go deep on AI. Here's what we learned about what genuine AI adoption actually looks like.
News · People + Culture

entry.title: Canva study: AI is in. Now comes the hard part – earning consumer trust
entry.content:
Our latest ‘The State of Marketing & AI Report’ finds that AI is now standard practice for marketing teams. The harder question is whether it's working.
News · Canva for Work

entry.title: Canva and Claude for Small Business make campaign creation possible for every small business owner
entry.content:
We’re proud to continue expanding our partnership with Anthropic, integrating the Canva Design Engine into Claude for Small Business, bringing the power of content and campaign creation to small business owners.
News · AI + Product

entry.title: Introducing Learn Grid: A new home for learning, built for everyone
entry.content:
Learn Grid is Canva's new home for learning, bringing together curriculum-mapped resources, AI-powered activity creation, and lesson delivery in one place, free and open to everyone.
News · Education

entry.title: The AI advantage: What top organizations do differently
entry.content:
Our CCO Rob Giglio on what he took away from SXSW – and why the question everyone's asking about AI and creativity has a more interesting answer than you'd expect.
News · Perspectives
